head: dense_fg_aux
hypothesis: P5: temporal_stride=2 probe. Current T=5 stride=1 covers ~0.17s at 30fps. Stride=2 widens to ~0.33s — same T=5 frames, wider temporal context. Zero architecture change, zero inference cost. Single variable vs E-45 (stride=1). Success: pf_mIoU stable (±0.01), improvement on fast-motion videos, no degradation on static camouflage. No-go: pf_mIoU drop >0.01, pygmy_seahorse_0 or flatfish_2 degrade, center_error increase >10%.
